headline: Blanche рҹҚҶрҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ–пёҸ SAYS SORRY рҹҷҮвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ for Epstein Files рҹ—ӮпёҸрҹ’Ұ Mistakes рҹӨЎ
text: Acting AG Todd Blanche рҹҚҶрҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ–пёҸ got BIPARTISAN ROASTED рҹ”ҘрҹҚ– on Capitol Hill рҹҸӣпёҸ for Epstein FILES рҹ—ӮпёҸрҹ’Ұ MESS-UP рҹҘҙ while chasing the PERMANENT рҹ”ҘрҹҚҶ top cop job! Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ just FIRED Pam Bondi рҹ’ғрҹ”Ҙ over the slow Epstein DROPS рҹҢ§пёҸ and now Blanche is sweating рҹҳ°рҹ’Ұ under the HOT LIGHTS рҹ’ЎрҹҳӨ. Redacted pages рҹ“„вңӮпёҸ had mistakes, so Blanche dropped the S-word: 'I VERY MUCH APOLOGISE рҹҷҮвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҷҮвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ' to Epstein survivors рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҰ°рҹ’” after 1% of redactions needed FIXES рҹ”§. 'Herculean task рҹҸӢпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ә' he cried, but the ladies in redacted T-shirts рҹ‘•рҹҡ« weren't buying it! Senator Grassley рҹ§“рҹҗҗ grilled him on Ghislaine Maxwell рҹ§ҷвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ”’ getting that lower-security PRISON UPGRADE рҹӣҢв¬ҶпёҸ, while Blumenthal рҹ§”вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ“ң demanded a FULL SORRY рҹҘә. Blanche clapped back 'MISTAKES SHOULDN'T HAPPEN' but the victims wanted MORE THAN WORDS рҹ’¬вһЎпёҸрҹ’ё. Then came the 'ANTI-WEAPONISATION FUND' рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ’° $1.7BN рҹҚ‘рҹ’Ұ вҖ“ a judge just NULLIFIED вқҢ the Trump-IRS DEAL рҹӨқрҹҡ« and senators from BOTH SIDES wanted Blanche to bury it six feet under вҡ°пёҸ. 'It should NEVER BE PAID OUT' рҹҚҶрҹҡ« said Tillis, and Blanche swore 'I AM CONFIDENT IT WILL NOT' рҹҷ…вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ. On Trump рҹҚҠ running for a THIRD TERM рҹ—іпёҸрҹ§“, Blanche dropped the CONSTITUTION BOMB рҹ’Јрҹ“ң: 'I DON'T BELIEVE HE IS ELIGIBLE' вҖ“ no VP loophole for the Don рҹ•¶пёҸ. Kennedy рҹҗҠ asked if Blanche is 'FRIENDS' рҹӨқ with Trump and Blanche snapped: 'I'm his lawyer, not his BFF рҹ’… вҖ“ you don't call your criminal defense attorney your bestie!' рҹҳӮ. Booker рҹҡҖ tried rapid-fire on the Paramount-Warner merger but Blanche clapped 'YOU DON'T EVEN LET ME ANSWER, MAN' рҹҳӨрҹҚҶ. Whitehouse got called 'EXTRAORDINARILY OBNOXIOUS' рҹӨЎ when he questioned Kash Patel's FBI fitness рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ. Cornyn and Tillis still holding out their GOP votes рҹ—іпёҸ but Blanche might SLIDE THROUGH if the weapon fund stays DEAD рҹ’Җ. Trump wants Blanche locked in permanently рҹ”’ so the retribution tour рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ”Ҙ can keep rolling. Epstein files still leaking like a BROKEN FAUCET рҹҡ°рҹ’Ұ and Blanche is the guy holding the mop рҹ§№ вҖ“ mistakes made, apologies tossed, but the grilling ain't over till the Senate says YES or NO! рҹ”ҘрҹҚҶрҹ“ң
